title: NewShop
description: A complete and intuitive virtual store system for Minecraft Paper servers, allowing players to buy and sell items to each other through a menu.
body:
# NewShop Plugin
A complete virtual store system for Minecraft Paper servers, fully integrated with the Vault and EssentialsX economy.
## 🛒 Features
- ✅ GUI Menus
- ✅ Configurable Limits
- ✅ Sales Tax
- ✅ Editable Messages
## 📋 Requirements
- Minecraft: 1.20.1+
- Server: Paper (recommended) or Spigot
- Java: 17+
- Dependencies: Vault and EssentialsX
